source_note: Global Settlement in Entergy Louisiana, LLC, Ex Parte — In Re: Application for an Increase in Rates, Whether Through a Formula Rate Plan Extension or Rate Review, and Proposed Revisions to Certain Fees Assessed to Customers, before the Louisiana Public Service Commission, Docket No. U-36959 (32 pp). The settlement, joined by LPSC Staff and intervenors (Alliance for Affordable Energy, LEUG, Walmart, DoD/federal agencies, et al.), continues a Formula Rate Plan (Rider FRP) for three years with annual evaluation reports due May 31, 2025 and 2026. Filed 2024. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: LPSC public docket portal, file +TYZ0y9CRc0= (lpscpubvalence.lpsc.louisiana.gov/portal/PSC/ViewFile?fileId=%2BTYZ0y9CRc0%3D; docket landing: DocketDetails?docketId=31370).
